description: Validate a Clinical Study Report (CSR) against the ICH-E3 section structure (read-only).
rules: read-only — never edits the input report
checks for the 15 ICH-E3 sections (synopsis, ethics, efficacy, safety, appendices, etc.) via header regex
computes a compliance rate and PASS / NEEDS_REVISION status
JSON validation report written to record_store
limitation: Header-pattern heuristic only; detects presence of section headings, not their adequacy. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
